case_title: GREATER NEVADA CREDIT UNION VS. KIMBERLY CONNER

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREATER NEVADA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY $2,356.53 PRINCIPAL, $924.77 INTEREST, $148.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,429.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREATER NEVADA CREDIT UNION SERVED JAN-31-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAR-14-2005 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $31.46 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREATER NEVADA CREDIT UNION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGT SATISFIED IN FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREATER NEVADA CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREATER NEVADA CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, KIMBERLY
